meaning: 托里诺[意大利西北部城市](即都灵)
examples: I myself am from Torino. You know Torino?
For proof, see Clint Eastwood's Gran Torino.
Snow-capped Alpine peaks are visible as dim gray blotches near a bright concentration of lights at left—the Italian city of Torino (Turin).
Leaders Juventus travel to Torino on Sunday while third place AC Milan host Catania.
Ten-man Roma picked up all three points at Torino courtesy of a 2-1 victory.
